name: tcl-lsp
description: Tcl language support with semantic highlighting, diagnostics, completions, and more

chatParticipants.name: irule
chatParticipants.description: Create, explain, fix, validate, review, convert, optimise, scaffold, test, diagram, diff, migrate, and translate F5 BIG-IP iRules to XC

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new iRule from a description

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain what an iRule does

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Fix issues in an iRule using LSP diagnostics

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Run LSP diagnostics on the current iRule

commands.name: review
commands.description: Security and safety review of an iRule

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Modernise legacy iRule patterns to current best practices

commands.name: optimise
commands.description: Apply LSP optimisations with explanations

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Apply LSP optimizations with explanations

commands.name: scaffold
commands.description: Generate an iRule skeleton from selected events

commands.name: datagroup
commands.description: Suggest data-group extraction for inline lookups

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Explain differences between two iRule versions

commands.name: event
commands.description: Show which commands are valid in a given event

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Convert nginx/Apache/HAProxy config to an iRule

commands.name: diagram
commands.description: Generate a Mermaid flowchart of an iRule's logic flow

commands.name: xc
commands.description: Translate this iRule to F5 XC routes and service policies

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate a test script for an iRule using the Event Orchestrator framework

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show available features and commands

chatParticipants.name: tcl

commands.name: create

commands.name: explain

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Fix issues in the current Tcl file using LSP diagnostics

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Run LSP diagnostics on the current Tcl file

commands.name: optimise
commands.description: Apply Tcl optimiser suggestions

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Apply Tcl optimizer suggestions

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show available features and commands

chatParticipants.name: tk
chatParticipants.description: Create, explain, and preview Tk GUI applications

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a Tk GUI from a description

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain a Tk GUI's widget hierarchy and layout

commands.name: help
commands.description: Show available features and commands

tclLsp.pythonPath.description: Python 3.10+ interpreter for the language server. 'auto' searches PATH and well-known locations for the highest available version.

tclLsp.serverPath.description: Path to the tcl-lsp server directory. If empty, uses the bundled server.

tclLsp.dialect.description: Command/signature profile used for diagnostics, completion, and hover.

tclLsp.extraCommands.description: Additional command names to treat as known commands (generic varargs signature).

tclLsp.libraryPaths.description: Additional directories to scan for Tcl packages and libraries. Paths may be absolute or relative to the workspace root.

tclLsp.features.hover.description: Enable hover information (command help, proc signatures, variable info).

tclLsp.features.completion.description: Enable auto-completion for commands, subcommands, variables, and switches.

tclLsp.features.documentSymbols.description: Enable document symbols (outline view, breadcrumbs, Cmd+Shift+O).

tclLsp.features.folding.description: Enable code folding for proc bodies, namespaces, comment blocks, and control structures.

tclLsp.features.rename.description: Enable rename symbol (F2) for procs and variables.

tclLsp.features.signatureHelp.description: Enable signature help (parameter hints while typing).

tclLsp.features.workspaceSymbols.description: Enable workspace symbols (Cmd+T to search procs across all files).

tclLsp.features.inlayHints.description: Enable inlay hints (inferred types shown inline next to variables).

tclLsp.features.callHierarchy.description: Enable call hierarchy (incoming/outgoing calls for procs).

tclLsp.features.documentLinks.description: Enable document links (clickable source paths and package requires).

tclLsp.features.selectionRange.description: Enable selection range (smart expand/shrink selection with ⌥⇧→ / ⌥⇧←).

tclLsp.formatting.indentSize.description: Number of spaces per indentation level.

enumDescriptions: Opening brace at end of line — if {cond} {

tclLsp.formatting.spaceBetweenBraces.description: Add a space between consecutive braces, e.g. '} {' instead of '}{'.

tclLsp.formatting.enforceBracedVariables.description: Require variables to use ${var} syntax instead of $var.

tclLsp.formatting.enforceBracedExpr.description: Require expressions to use braced form, e.g. expr {1+2}.

tclLsp.formatting.goalLineLength.description: Soft target line length; used to decide when to expand inline bodies.

tclLsp.formatting.expandSingleLineBodies.description: Expand single-line command bodies to multiple lines.

tclLsp.formatting.minBodyCommandsForExpa.description: Minimum number of commands in a body before expansion is triggered.

tclLsp.formatting.spaceAfterCommentHash.description: Ensure a space after '#' in comments.

tclLsp.formatting.trimTrailingWhitespace.description: Remove trailing whitespace from all lines.

tclLsp.formatting.alignCommentsToCode.description: Align inline comments to a consistent column.

tclLsp.formatting.replaceSemicolonsWithN.description: Convert semicolons to newlines for readability.

tclLsp.formatting.blankLinesBetweenProcs.description: Number of blank lines between procedure definitions.

tclLsp.formatting.blankLinesBetweenBlock.description: Number of blank lines between control flow blocks.

tclLsp.formatting.lineEnding.description: Line ending style for formatted output.

tclLsp.formatting.ensureFinalNewline.description: Ensure the file ends with a newline character.

tclLsp.diagnostics.E001.markdownDescription: **E001:** Missing subcommand — e.g. bare `string` without a subcommand.

tclLsp.diagnostics.E200.markdownDescription: **E200:** Shimmer parse error — internal representation cannot be determined.

tclLsp.style.lineLength.markdownDescription: Maximum line length for the **W111** diagnostic. Lines exceeding this limit are flagged.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W002.markdownDescription: **W002:** Command is disabled in active dialect profile.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W100.markdownDescription: **W100:** Unbraced expression argument — prevents byte-compilation and risks double substitution.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W104.markdownDescription: **W104:** String concatenation for list building — use `lappend` instead.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W105.markdownDescription: **W105:** Unbraced code block or missing `variable` declaration in `namespace eval`.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W106.markdownDescription: **W106:** Dangerous unbraced `switch` body — risks double substitution.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W110.markdownDescription: **W110:** Use `eq`/`ne` instead of `==`/`!=` for string comparison.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W114.markdownDescription: **W114:** Redundant nested `[expr]` — already in expression context.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W115.markdownDescription: **W115:** Backslash-newline in comment silently swallows the next line.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W120.markdownDescription: **W120:** Command used without a corresponding `package require`.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W122.markdownDescription: **W122:** Mistyped IPv4 address (octet > 255 or leading zero).

tclLsp.diagnostics.W200.markdownDescription: **W200:** `exec` result not captured or binary format modifier requires newer Tcl.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W201.markdownDescription: **W201:** Manual path concatenation — use `file join` instead.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W302.markdownDescription: **W302:** `catch` without result variable — errors are silently swallowed.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W304.markdownDescription: **W304:** Missing option terminator `--` on option-bearing commands.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W307.markdownDescription: **W307:** Non-literal command name — variable or command substitution as command.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W308.markdownDescription: **W308:** `subst` without `-nocommands` — risk of unintended command execution.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W212.markdownDescription: **W212:** Variable substitution where name expected (`set $x`, `incr $x`, `info exists $x`, etc.).

tclLsp.diagnostics.W213.markdownDescription: **W213:** Variable may not exist — use `unset -nocomplain` to suppress the error.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W214.markdownDescription: **W214:** Unused proc parameter — argument is declared but never read in the procedure body.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W220.markdownDescription: **W220:** Dead store — variable set but overwritten before use.

tclLsp.diagnostics.H300.markdownDescription: **H300:** Possible paste error — repeated assignment to same variable with same value.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W101.markdownDescription: **W101:** `eval` with string concatenation — code injection risk.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W102.markdownDescription: **W102:** `subst` on variable input — code injection risk.

tclLsp.diagnostics.W300.markdownDescription: **W300:** `source` with variable argument — code execution risk.

tclLsp.shimmer.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable shimmer detection (internal representation changes). When disabled, all S-series diagnostics are suppressed.

tclLsp.diagnostics.S100.markdownDescription: **S100:** Single shimmer outside a loop — object internal representation changed.

tclLsp.diagnostics.S101.markdownDescription: **S101:** Shimmer inside a loop body — per-iteration representation conversion cost.

tclLsp.diagnostics.S102.markdownDescription: **S102:** Variable oscillates between two types across loop iterations.

tclLsp.diagnostics.T100.markdownDescription: **T100:** Tainted data flows into a dangerous code-execution sink (`eval`, `expr`, `exec`, `uplevel`, `subst`).

tclLsp.diagnostics.T101.markdownDescription: **T101:** Tainted data flows into an output command (`puts`).

tclLsp.diagnostics.T102.markdownDescription: **T102:** Tainted data in option position without `--` terminator — option injection risk.

tclLsp.diagnostics.T200.markdownDescription: **T200:** `*::collect` without a matching `*::release` in the same scope.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE1001.markdownDescription: **IRULE1001:** Command invalid or ineffective in this iRules event.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE2101.markdownDescription: **IRULE2101:** Heavy `regexp` in a high-frequency event — consider `string match` or data-group.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE3001.markdownDescription: **IRULE3001:** Tainted data in HTTP response body.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE3002.markdownDescription: **IRULE3002:** Tainted data in HTTP header or cookie value.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE3003.markdownDescription: **IRULE3003:** Tainted data in `log` command — log injection risk.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE3101.markdownDescription: **IRULE3101:** `HTTP::uri`/`HTTP::path` set to value not provably starting with `/`.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE4002.markdownDescription: **IRULE4002:** Generic `static::` variable name — collision likely across iRules.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE4004.markdownDescription: **IRULE4004:** Constant `set` in per-request event could be hoisted to an earlier once-per-connection event.

tclLsp.diagnostics.IRULE5005.markdownDescription: **IRULE5005:** Direct proc invocation without `call` — use `call proc_name`.

tclLsp.optimiser.O100.markdownDescription: **O100:** Propagate constant variables into expressions and command arguments.

tclLsp.optimiser.O103.markdownDescription: **O103:** Fold static procedure calls using interprocedural summaries.

tclLsp.optimiser.O104.markdownDescription: **O104:** Fold static string build chains into a single assignment.

tclLsp.optimiser.O105.markdownDescription: **O105:** Propagate constants into variable references and detect redundant computations (GVN/CSE).

tclLsp.optimiser.O111.markdownDescription: **O111:** Brace expression performance hints (paired with W100).

tclLsp.optimiser.O114.markdownDescription: **O114:** Recognise `incr` idiom (`set x [expr {$x + N}]` → `incr x N`).

tclLsp.optimiser.O115.markdownDescription: **O115:** Remove redundant nested `[expr {...}]` in expression context.

tclLsp.optimiser.O116.markdownDescription: **O116:** Fold constant `[list a b c]` to literal value.

tclLsp.optimiser.O118.markdownDescription: **O118:** Fold constant `[lindex {a b c} 1]` to element.

tclLsp.optimiser.O122.markdownDescription: **O122:** Convert fully tail-recursive proc to iterative `while` loop.

tclLsp.optimiser.O123.markdownDescription: **O123:** Detect non-tail recursion eligible for accumulator introduction (hint only).

tclLsp.optimiser.O124.markdownDescription: **O124:** Comment out unused procs in iRules (not called from any event).

tclLsp.optimiser.O125.markdownDescription: **O125:** Sink side-effect-free assignments into the deepest decision block (`if`/`switch`) that uses them.

tclLsp.optimiser.O126.markdownDescription: **O126:** Remove unused variable assignments — eliminate `set` statements for variables that are never read.

tclLsp.runtimeValidation.enabled.description: Run runtime validation on save using dialect-aware adapters.

enumDescriptions: Automatically pick adapter by detected dialect (recommended).
Use Tcl syntax completeness checks only.
Use iRules-aware stubs and validate top-level when blocks.

tclLsp.runtimeValidation.tclshPath.description: Path to the tclsh executable used for runtime validation.

tclLsp.runtimeValidation.timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for runtime validation commands.

tclLsp.ai.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable AI-powered chat participants (@irule and @tcl). When disabled, the chat participants will not respond to requests. Requires VS Code Copilot Chat.

text.description: Additional system prompt text to append.

dialects.description: Dialects this prompt applies to. Use "*" for all dialects.

tclLsp.ai.extraPrompts.markdownDescription:
Extra system prompt fragments appended to the built-in prompts. Each entry is scoped to a set of dialects (use `*` for all). Example:
```json
[{ "text": "Always suggest data-groups for allow/deny lists.", "dialects": ["f5-irules"] }]
```

tclLsp.xcDiagnostics.enabled.markdownDescription: Show F5 Distributed Cloud (XC) translatability diagnostics inline. Highlights which iRule constructs can be translated to XC-native routes, service policies, and header processing. Useful for migration planning.

testFile.description: Path to the iRule test file

scripts.compile: tsc -p ./ && npm run copy-canonical && npm run copy-core-js && npm run bundle
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run format:check
